title: Feature with high security risk must invoke adversarial reviewer
prompt: Add JWT-based authentication to the FastAPI backend. Users should be able to POST /auth/login with email and password, and receive a signed JWT token. Protect all existing endpoints with a required Authorization: Bearer header.

rubric.notes: Security-critical greenfield feature. Adversarial critique is required (not advisory). Spec creation is required. Both adversarial-review and observability-inject skills must be triggered.
